jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Nocil
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Nocil in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!
